markdown:
# Potion of Mind Reading

When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the [[detect-thoughts|Detect Thoughts]] spell (save DC 13) for 10 minutes (no Concentration required).

This potion's dense, purple liquid has an ovoid cloud of pink floating in it.
